title: How to convert a date calculated by a calculation formula into a date format column?

posts.author: jhyuklee (jhlee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday has various automation methods related to duedate, and I want to take advantage of them.
However, they calculate due date or perform other automation based on column values displayed in date format.
However, I want to execute these automations based on the date of the column determined by the function expression.
In other words, although it is a date, is there any way to perform the above automation based on a column with a date determined by a function expression, rather than a column in date format?

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jhyuklee,

Why don’t you illustrate your question with an example of what you are trying to accomplish?
